notes: Removed the @media (min-width: 600px) desktop column clamp (added v1.6.31, never reverted — v1.6.33 was skipped, so it survived through v1.6.34). That block forced #app/.tab-nav/#action-stripe/#omni-bar into a centered 480px phone column at every viewport >=600px AND actively disabled the pre-existing 768/1024/1400px adaptive desktop layouts, which is why the laptop rendered as a narrow phone strip. With the block gone, PHANTOM renders as a normal responsive web app on laptop (wider gutters at 768px, multi-column KNOW/CLI/POWER + hardware-matrix grids at 1024px, content capped at 1360px and centered at 1400px+) and byte-identical on phone (<768px: nothing fires). Resume-banner #boot padding fix and dynamic boot-subtitle version retained. No JS touched; --tap-* sizing tokens unchanged; no functional surfaces touched (phantom_parseMaster, PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, MASTER tab, EDP/BOM, deploy_*, Ghost Echo, PIN gating, boot-restore). SW CACHE_VERSION bumped together.
